meanings.usage: 可指法律上的公正审判，也可指抽象的正义概念
指复杂的组织或机构系统
形容需要付出大量努力的困难工作或旅程
与具体事物相对的，存在于概念中的

meanings.meaning: 沉闷的；压低的；听不清的
meanings.usage: 形容声音被压抑或减弱的
指吸引人做某事的力量或冲动
指确定某物的确切位置
指从某处出来或显露出来
指把某人或某物交给另一个人或权威机构
指在没有外部压力的情况下自己去做某事
指开始进行一项工作或任务
指用工具凿开或削去材料
指从一种用途或形式改变为另一种
指建筑物及其所在的场地，常用复数形式

phrases.usage: 表示正义已经得到伸张或实现

examples.en: Justice has been done even before the man was handed over to the police.
examples.zh: 甚至在这个人移交给警察之前，正义就已经得到了伸张。

phrases.usage: 表示某人自食其果、活该倒霉

examples.en: The shop assistants must have found it impossible to resist the temptation to say 'it serves him right'.
examples.zh: 店员们一定会觉得忍不住想说'他活该'。

examples.en: The manager promptly rang up the fire brigade.
examples.zh: 经理立刻给消防队打了电话。

examples.en: He had tried to break into the shop during the night but had got stuck in the chimney.
examples.zh: 他试图在夜间闯入商店，但卡在了烟囱里。

examples.en: Justice had been done even before the man was handed over to the police.
examples.zh: 甚至在这个人移交给警察之前，正义就已经得到了伸张。

examples.en: We are, in part, admitting that a certain set of circumstances has enabled justice to act of its own accord.
examples.zh: 我们在某种程度上承认，某些环境因素使得正义能够自行发挥作用。

phrases.usage: 毫无疑问地；确定无疑地

examples.en: We might say that justice has been done when a man's innocence or guilt has been proved beyond doubt.
examples.zh: 当一个人的清白或罪行被毫无疑问地证实后，我们可以说正义得到了伸张。

examples.en: Those who seek it, undertake an arduous journey and can never be sure that they will find it.
examples.zh: 那些寻求正义的人，踏上了艰难的旅程，而且永远无法确定他们能否找到它。

examples.en: When a thief was caught on the premises of a large jewellery store one morning.
examples.zh: 一天早上，当一个小偷在一家大型珠宝店的场所内被抓时。

phrases.usage: 通过做某事使某人获救

examples.en: The fire fighters were eventually able to free him by cutting a huge hole in the wall.
examples.zh: 消防队员最终通过在墙上凿开一个大洞将他救了出来。

grammar.title: 被动语态 (Passive Voice)
grammar.definition: 当句子的主语是动作的承受者时使用被动语态。主动语态中动作的执行者（agent）可以用by引出，但经常被省略。
grammar.structure: be + 过去分词 (be + past participle)
grammar.usage: 用于强调动作的承受者，或动作执行者不明确、不重要时。

examples.en: Justice has been done even before the man was handed over to the police.
examples.zh: 甚至在这个人移交给警察之前，正义就已经得到了伸张。

examples.en: The shop was an old converted house.
examples.zh: 那家商店是一栋改建的老房子。

grammar.title: 现在完成时 (Present Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去发生的动作或状态持续到现在，或对现在有影响。常与already, just, yet, for, since等词连用。
grammar.usage: 用于表示过去的动作与现在有关联，或动作已发生但强调其结果。

examples.en: The cry was repeated several times.
He had been there for nearly ten hours.
examples.zh: 他在那里已经呆了将近十个小时。

examples.en: She ran to tell the manager who promptly rang up the fire brigade.
examples.zh: 她跑去告诉经理，经理立刻给消防队打了电话。

grammar.title: 定语从句 (Relative Clause)
grammar.definition: 用于修饰名词或代词的从句，由关系代词（who, whom, which, that）或关系副词（where, when, why）引导。
grammar.structure: 名词/代词 + 关系词 + 从句
grammar.usage: 用于提供关于某人或某物的额外信息。

examples.en: The cry had certainly come from one of the chimneys, but as there were so many of them, the firemen could not be certain which one it was.
examples.zh: 哭喊声确实是从某个烟囱里传来的，但由于烟囱太多，消防员无法确定是哪一个。

examples.en: Those who seek it, undertake an arduous journey.
examples.zh: 那些寻求正义的人，踏上了艰难的旅程。

imitations.en: It serves you right for being late.
It serves her right for not studying.

sentencePatterns.pattern: Someone + be + unable to + 动词原形

original.en: As it was extremely narrow, the man was unable to move.
original.zh: 由于烟囱非常狭窄，这个人无法动弹。

imitations.en: She was unable to attend the meeting.
I was unable to solve the problem.

sentencePatterns.pattern: When + 时间状语从句, 主句

original.en: When a thief was caught on the premises of a large jewellery store one morning, the shop assistants must have found it impossible to resist the temptation to say 'it serves him right'.
original.zh: 一天早上，当一个小偷在一家大型珠宝店的场所内被抓时，店员们一定会觉得忍不住想说'他活该'。

imitations.en: When I was young, I used to play in the park.
imitations.zh: 当我年轻的时候，我常在公园里玩。

imitations.en: When he arrived home, it was already dark.
imitations.zh: 当他到家时，天已经黑了。
